code:
import io
import string

fn process(_ token: String) -> Int
  if string.is_empty(token)
    0
  else
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      if v > 0
        v * 2
      else
        0
      end
    when None
      0
    end
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        sum = sum + process(token)
        token = ""
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  sum = sum + process(token)
  println("result=#{sum}")
end
